description: Apollo.io is a sales intelligence and engagement platform for searching and enriching people and company data and managing go-to-market workflows. It also provides CRM, sequencing, analytics, and related sales operations features.
summary: Apollo.io exposes a REST API at `https://api.apollo.io/api/v1`, a remote OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.apollo.io/mcp`, and a first-party `apollo` CLI.
